{{Quote|Enemy fighters and drop ships penetrating the envelope. Bearing on a course for Tanallay Surge complex.|A [[Unidentified New Republic pilot (Tynna)|New Republic pilot]], during the Battle of Tynna|<ref name="AoCII">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref>}}
The '''Tanallay Surge complex''' was a major political and recreational hub on the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]]. The seat of the [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnan]] [[Tynnan government|government]], it was surrounded by [[Water/Legends|water]] chutes and fountains and was several stories in height. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Tynna|assaulted]] Tynna and landed at the Surge complex to begin a program of [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] on the planet.

==Description==
The Tanallay Surge complex was a legislative and recreational installation on the<ref name="EGTPM" /> [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]], and the seat of the [[Tynnan/Legends|Tynnan]] [[Tynnan government|government]].<ref name="EGTPM" /> It was several stories high, spread out over a large area and fronted by a wide set of steps linked to a picturesque lagoon. Surrounded by many [[Swimming pool|pools]], [[Water/Legends|water]] chutes, and fountains,<ref name="AoCII" /> the complex was the site of the [[Tanallay Surge posting agency]], a [[Posting Agency|posting agency]] frequented by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]].<ref name="BHC" />

==History==
{{Quote|What we're seeing is going live to every city on Tynna.|A [[Unidentified New Republic pilot (Tynna)|New Republic pilot]], on the satellite feed of the complex|<ref name="AoCII" />}}
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Tynna|attacked]] Tynna, [[Starfighter combat/Legends|defeating]] its meager defensive contingent of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], and made planetfall at the Tanallay Surge complex. As they did so, an unarmed group of several hundred Tynnans<ref name="AoCII" />—tricked by the collaborationist [[Peace Brigade]] into surrendering Tynna to the invaders without firing a shot<ref name="NJOSB">''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]''</ref>—awaited the landing force at the main steps above the lagoon.<ref name="AoCII" />

The Yuuzhan Vong force led by [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Nas Choka]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Malik Carr]], however, had no intentions of meeting with the Tynnans and left them to wait at the Surge complex. In the meantime, the Yuuzhan Vong began the [[Terraforming/Legends|biological engineering]] of Tynna's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]], releasing a [[Yuuzhan Vong chemical|chemical]] from their [[Dropship/Legends|dropships]] to optimize the water for the cultivation of [[biot]]s such as [[dovin basal]]s for use in their further conquest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. These events were witnessed by a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[LightStealth-18 Reconnaissance Ship|stealth ship]] as they were broadcast via [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]] to every [[City/Legends|city]] on Tynna.<ref name="AoCII" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Tanallay Surge complex was first mentioned in the [[1998]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'', which was written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and illustrated by [[Brandon McKinney]] and [[Scott Kolins]].<ref name="EGTPM" /> The complex later made its first appearance in [[James Luceno]]'s [[2000]] novel, ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''.<ref name="AoCII" />
